001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.AcceptedState;
004import java.util.List;
005
006/**
007 * Service providing CRUD-style operations for {@link AcceptedState} entities.
008 */
009public interface AcceptedStateService {
010
011  /**
012   * Returns all accepted states.
013   *
014   * @return list of accepted states.
015   */
016  List<AcceptedState> getAll();
017
018  /**
019   * Returns an accepted state by status tag.
020   *
021   * @param statusTag status tag.
022   * @return accepted state.
023   */
024  AcceptedState getByStatusTag(String statusTag);
025
026  /**
027   * Creates a new accepted state.
028   *
029   * @param newAcceptedState accepted state to create.
030   * @return created entity.
031   */
032  AcceptedState createNewAcceptedState(AcceptedState newAcceptedState);
033
034  /**
035   * Updates the description for an accepted state.
036   *
037   * @param statusTag status tag of the state to update.
038   * @param newDescription new description text.
039   * @return updated entity.
040   */
041  AcceptedState updateAcceptedStateDescription(String statusTag, String newDescription);
042
043  /**
044   * Deletes an accepted state if it is not currently referenced by any reports.
045   *
046   * @param statusTag status tag of the state to delete.
047   */
048  void deleteUnusedAcceptedState(String statusTag);
049
050}
051
